content: The performance gap between intrinsic curiosity modules (ICM), random network distillation (RND), and specialized curious agents can be closed by integrating 2024-2025 SOTA active learning memory architectures that prune low-information prior exploration experiences to retain only high-surprise, plan-relevant episodic memories. This hybrid curiosity framework creates a self-reinforcing loop where active memory selection amplifies the efficiency of intrinsic reward signals, rather than wasting compute on redundant exploration.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
